name: @forgeax/engine-app
description: App shell + game loop helper (rAF + start/stop/pause + auto input) for forgeax-engine.

bundle-size.reason: MVP shell package; bundle-size lock deferred until API stabilises and meaningful threshold can be locked

fps.reason: library helper without bundled canvas; fps reported by hello-app and other host apps that consume createApp

bench.reason: rAF main loop is a thin orchestration layer; not a perf-critical surface for the MVP

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; AC surface coverage runs as part of pnpm test:unit + tsc -b

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; this is a production MVP per plan-strategy D-5 (double SSOT entry + thin wrapper)
